title: Derive action/stiffness coefficient origin for q
description: The parent action/stiffness functional S_parent[A, A_spatial, ...] must be written and varied to derive the coefficient ratio q = q_action[c_i] before recovery targets gamma_like=1 or AB=1 are checked. Independent stiffness alone cannot relate A and A_spatial. Coupled stiffness c_x grad A · grad A_spatial is the minimal candidate. The functional itself and all coefficient origins must be specified before closure is claimed.
